summary: All four spec-100 requirements carry genuine RED-pin tests and the full new suite is GREEN across internal/validate, internal/approve, internal/adr, cmd/mindspec (4 ok, 0 fail). R1 cross-gate consistency is pinned at BOTH gates with the SAME file-path-Impacted-Domains fixture: TestValidateDivergenceFilePathImpactedDomainResolves (bead-time divergence, file path internal/genevieve/review.py resolves to owner, zero adr-divergence-unowned) AND TestPlanCoverageFilePathImpactedResolves + TestCheckADRCitationsFilePathImpactedResolves (plan-time, no spurious adr-coverage-missing / adr-cite-irrelevant). The >1-owner ambiguity is pinned at the helper unit (TestNormalizeImpactedDomainsAmbiguousOwnerErrors, alpha+beta both claim internal/foo/**) AND at the plan gate (TestNormalizeZeroAndAmbiguousAtPlanGate/ambiguous-owner asserts both owners named); zero-owner pinned at helper, divergence (TestValidateDivergenceZeroOwnerEntryErrors) and plan gates. Blast-radius guard preservation is genuinely pinned: TestCompleteRejectsUndeclaredDomainTouch (changed file in undeclared payments domain still fails adr-divergence-uncovered) and TestUnownedFileRejected/TestValidateDivergenceGenuinelyUnownedStillFails (truly unowned file still adr-divergence-unowned) both pass under the normalized candidate set — the candidate set stays the resolved DECLARED domains, not all-domains, so the original 087 guard intent is intact. Named-domain 099-style regression pinned (TestValidateDivergenceNamedDomainUnchanged). R2 both branches pinned (TestPlanCoverageHintMentionsExistingADR asserts 'existing'+'domain' when an Accepted ADR is cited; TestPlanCoverageHintCreateWhenNoCitation asserts 'mindspec adr create' when none cited). R3 worktree-awareness pinned with fabricated git-worktree linkage (TestAdrShowWorktree_FindsWorktreeLocalADR / TestAdrListWorktree_ListsWorktreeLocalADR are RED on the pre-fix FindRoot path, plus main-only-still-visible and plain-checkout no-regression tests), and the non-list Domain(s) parse regression-locked (TestParseADR_NonListDomainLine, both list and bare forms). R4 both ACs pinned (TestScaffoldPlanEmitsADRCitations asserts the key lands inside the frontmatter fence region; TestValidatePlanCitationsWarnNamesKey asserts the adr-citations WARN names the adr_citations key). The ADR-0032 amendment is authored substantively (softening sub-decision 1, +workflow domain) and is exercised behaviorally by the R1 file-path resolution tests rather than only as prose. Hermeticity confirmed: every new test uses t.TempDir / MockExecutor / hand-built worktree linkage with nil exec on the on-disk plan path; grep finds no harness/LLM/network/exec.Command dependency in any of the six new test files. No critical behavior left unpinned.
